{"parts":[{"content":"**Drop D2.1 Complete**

I have successfully created the template schema specification at `Skills/frontend/templates/_TEMPLATE.yaml`. The schema includes:

✅ **Required metadata fields** (name, description, source, created)  
✅ **Complete 7-color palette** (primary, secondary, accent, background, surface, text, text_muted)  
✅ **Typography configuration** (heading_font, body_font, scale, heading_weight, optional mono_font)  
✅ **Layout settings** (max_width, spacing, border_radius with enum values)  
✅ **Sections array** (ordered list of page components with types and variants)  
✅ **Style notes field** (freeform text for capturing aesthetic nuance)  
✅ **Extensibility via custom field** (template-specific overrides)  
✅ **Comprehensive documentation** (comments explaining every field and valid values)  
✅ **Reference images support** (optional visual references)  

The schema balances structure with flexibility - structured fields ensure consistency while style_notes and custom fields capture unique characteristics that can't be standardized.
